001package com.github.tommyettinger.tantrum.libgdx.helpers;
002
003import org.apache.fory.memory.MemoryBuffer;
004
005public final class Support {
006    private Support() {
007    }
008
009    /**
010     * This method should be used to read data written by
011     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeBooleansWithSize(boolean[])}
012     */
013    public static boolean[] readBooleansAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
014        final int numElements = buffer.readBinarySize();
015        boolean[] values = new boolean[numElements];
016        buffer.readBooleans(values, 0, numElements);
017        return values;
018    }
019
020    /**
021     * This method should be used to read data written by 
022     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeBytesWithSize(byte[])}.
023     * It delegates to {@link MemoryBuffer#readBytesAndSize()}.
024     */
025    public static byte[] readBytesAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
026        return buffer.readBytesAndSize();
027    }
028
029    /**
030     * This method should be used to read data written by 
031     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeShortsWithSize(short[])}.
032     */
033    public static short[] readShortsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
034        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
035        short[] values = new short[numElements];
036        buffer.readShorts(values, 0, numElements);
037        return values;
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * This method should be used to read data written by 
042     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeCharsWithSize(char[])}.
043     * It delegates to {@link MemoryBuffer#readCharsAndSize()}.
044     */
045    public static char[] readCharsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
046        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
047        char[] values = new char[numElements];
048        buffer.readCharArrayPayload(values, numElements << 1);
049        return values;
050    }
051
052    /**
053     * This method should be used to read data written by 
054     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeIntsWithSize(int[])}.
055     */
056    public static int[] readIntsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
057        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
058        int[] values = new int[numElements];
059        buffer.readInts(values, 0, numElements);
060        return values;
061    }
062
063    /**
064     * This method should be used to read data written by 
065     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeFloatsWithSize(float[])}.
066     */
067    public static float[] readFloatsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
068        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
069        float[] values = new float[numElements];
070        buffer.readFloats(values, 0, numElements);
071        return values;
072    }
073
074    /**
075     * This method should be used to read data written by 
076     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeLongsWithSize(long[])}.
077     */
078    public static long[] readLongsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
079        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
080        long[] values = new long[numElements];
081        buffer.readLongs(values, 0, numElements);
082        return values;
083    }
084
085    /**
086     * This method should be used to read data written by 
087     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writeDoublesWithSize(double[])}.
088     */
089    public static double[] readDoublesAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
090        final int numElements = buffer.readVarUInt32();
091        double[] values = new double[numElements];
092        buffer.readDoubles(values, 0, numElements);
093        return values;
094    }
095}
